caption: A man with light-colored, spiked hair, glasses, and headphones is seated in a studio, speaking into a black microphone. He is wearing a white button-down shirt, a small red bow tie, and light brown suspenders. He is positioned in front of a wall decorated with numerous framed photographs and clothing items, including a black dress on a mannequin and a shirt with "LEE" on the label. Two logos appear on the screen: one on the left reads "STUDIO PODCAST" and another on the right reads "GOSS TALK JOY PODCAST". Throughout the sequence, the man remains in the same position and outfit, though his facial expression shifts slightly as he talks, with his mouth open in the first two frames and closing more in the subsequent frames. The background elements and equipment remain stationary.
